## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX and Datagrid's renewal planning and track review for their partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Datagrid found high value in GrowthX's content generation but less value in other tracks](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Agreement to refocus on 3 tracks: programmatic content, editorialized newsletter, and listicles/comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [GrowthX to present a 6-month plan in \~2 weeks for execution and reallocation of resources](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [Datagrid's product now has API capabilities, enabling embedded experiences on web pages](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)

## Topics

### Current Partnership Performance

  - [Datagrid seeing consistent growth and increased brand searches (100+ daily)](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [GrowthX-created pages showing strong upward trajectory](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [Need to improve LLM visibility for Datagrid mentions](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)

### Successful GrowthX Strategies for Other Clients

  - [Vendor pages/catalogs with detailed brand info, comparisons, and interactive elements](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Programmatic use case pages for long-tail searches (e.g., VAPI's voice-to-agents pages)](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Weekly newsletters with high open rates (34-40%)](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
  - [Guides, listicles, and comparison content for improved citations](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)

### Datagrid Product Updates

  - [New API capabilities allow for embedded experiences and custom agent creation](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
  - [Customers using Datagrid for automations, including permit scraping (1000+ daily API calls)](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [Upcoming website redesign to showcase product, agents, and prompts](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)

### Proposed Strategy Adjustments

  - [Refocus on 3 tracks: programmatic content, editorialized newsletter, listicles/comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [Embed Datagrid agent experiences into web pages for interactive content](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Create catalogs of construction/industrial companies in Datagrid's TAM](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [Consider auto-generating videos for embedding in pages (lower priority)](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)

### Upcoming Events

  - [GrowthX to help Datagrid host a dinner event in September (likely last two weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Thiago visiting GrowthX office in third week of August](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to regroup with team and develop 6-month plan](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)
  - [Present plan to Datagrid in \~2 weeks for calibration and commitment](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [Begin reallocating resources towards new strategy](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
  - [GrowthX to finalize and send invites for upcoming meetings on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [Coordinate on construction dinner event planning for September](https://fathom.video/share/HiHDNJ9fUPRtabAM4xtSj3sNBfzvFBUw?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
